company.what_they_do: MantriAI is an AI-powered career advisor platform for job seekers. It provides a single, unified platform covering the entire job search workflow: job discovery, job description (JD) analysis, application tracking, LinkedIn content creation, networking support, and interview preparation. The core positioning is that job searching should not be harder than actually working — consolidating what are typically six or more separate tools into one.
raw_notes: Page title: 'MantriAI — Your career's sharpest advisor'
Meta description: 'Your career's sharpest advisor. One platform for job discovery, JD analysis, application tracking, LinkedIn content, networking, and interview prep.'
OG description: 'Your job search shouldn't be harder than your actual job. One platform for the entire loop.'
Twitter description: 'Your job search shouldn't be harder than your actual job.'
Theme color #D4962E (a warm amber/gold), suggesting a premium, confident brand aesthetic.
App is a React SPA (single-page application) with modular JS and CSS bundles — indicates a modern, actively developed web product.

A LinkedIn profile for 'Abhinav Jain (AJ)' describes him as building 'MantriAI — an AI career advisor for job seekers who are tired of juggling 6…' (truncated), confirming the 'six tools' pain-point framing and the IIT Delhi / Bengaluru background of at least one founder.
Abhinav Jain has prior experience at Pocket FM managing large-scale user acquisition ($7M+/month spend across Meta, Google, TikTok) and at Shipra Engineering in a leadership role.
Site appears very new; does not surface independently in web search results — consistent with an early-stage / recently launched startup.
No pricing page, blog, or press coverage found for mantriai.co specifically.
